title: Medical Assistant
description: Parexel is seeking a Medical Assistant to support clinical trial operations at our Milwaukee research site. You will collect vital signs, perform EKG testing, assist with blood draws, and provide patient support during study visits. Your work is essential to the integrity of clinical research that advances medical science and patient care.
responsibilities: Collect patient vital signs and document measurements accurately
Perform 12-lead EKG and submit for physician review
Assist phlebotomists with blood collection and specimen processing
Position patients for physical examinations and procedures
Educate patients about study procedures and protocol requirements
Maintain patient confidentiality and clean, safe study environment

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; medical assistant certificate or completion of accredited MA program preferred
skills: Patient vital signs and phlebotomy support
Attention to detail and patient safety
Ability to work with diverse patient populations

benefits: Tuition assistance for medical assistant certification
